mapper.sql: SELECT s.id, s.application_case_id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, s.mode, s.total_score, s.started_at, s.ended_at, s.created_at, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_question q WHERE q.interview_session_id = s.id ) AS question_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_answer a JOIN interview_question q2 ON q2.id = a.question_id WHERE q2.interview_session_id = s.id ) AS answered_count FROM interview_session s JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = s.application_case_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ac.user_id
